# GitHub Copilot Instructions Redirect for Along App

> **IMPORTANT:** This file is not the source of truth. All AI agents, Copilot sessions, and automation must treat `.ai-system/` as the canonical instruction set and workspace orchestration layer.

## First thing to do (every session)

1. Open and read **`.ai-system/agents/general-instructions.md`** (this is the master AI protocol).
2. Then read:
   - `.ai-system/planning/task-queue.md`
   - `.ai-system/agents/system-architecture.md`
   - `.ai-system/agents/design-system.md`
   - `.ai-system/agents/repair-system.md`
   - `.ai-system/project-context.md`

## Always use `.ai-system` constructs

- **Record decisions** in `.ai-system/memory/project-decisions.md`
- **Plan work** in `.ai-system/planning/project-plan.md` and/or `.ai-system/planning/task-queue.md`
- **Log progress** in `.ai-system/checkpoints/session-log.md`
- **Keep non-code guidance** in `.ai-system/summaries/dev-history.md`

> ⚠️ Do not edit this file except to update the redirect or provide critical project-level guidance. This file exists only to ensure agents bootstrap correctly.
